rules.rule_text:
rule ShadowTech
{
	meta:
		author = " Kevin Breen <kevin@techanarchy.net>"
		date = "2014/04"
		ref = "http://malwareconfig.com/stats/ShadowTech"
		maltype = "Remote Access Trojan"
		filetype = "exe"

	strings:
		$a = "ShadowTech" nocase
		$b = "DownloadContainer"
		$c = "MySettings"
		$d = "System.Configuration"
		$newline = "#-@NewLine@-#" wide
		$split = "pSIL" wide
		$key = "ESIL" wide

	condition:
		4 of them
}
